body.title: Fix yogai7 SSH publickey auth from akiendelllinux
body.result: Fixed: removed administrators_authorized_keys from Match block scope (StrictModes rejected it due to extra akien user permission); user-level C:\Users\igor_wild_0001\.ssh\authorized_keys now used. SSH from akiendelllinux working.
body.description:
SSH from akiendelllinux (10.0.0.229) to yogai7 (10.0.0.71) as igor_wild_0001 fails with publickey auth. Key is correct in both C:\ProgramData\ssh\administrators_authorized_keys AND C:\Users\igor_wild_0001\.ssh\authorized_keys. sshd_config has one correct Match Group administrators block. Permissions on administrators_authorized_keys: SYSTEM:(F) Administrators:(F). Event log shows: Authentication refused (publickey path), then Failed password fallback.

Steps (run on yogai7, report each result to home Igor via POST http://10.0.0.229:8080/api/cc_send with JSON body {content: result}):

1. Show current state: icacls both key files, Get-Content sshd_config last 15 lines, Get-WinEvent OpenSSH/Operational last 5.

2. Try StrictModes no: add line StrictModes no before the Match block in sshd_config, Restart-Service sshd, ask akiendelllinux to test (or check event log for connection attempt).

3. If still failing: remove Match block entirely (igor_wild_0001 already has user-level authorized_keys), Restart-Service sshd.

4. If still failing: enable sshd debug logging (LogLevel DEBUG3 in sshd_config), capture a connection attempt, report full log.

5. Report outcome to home Igor channel: POST http://10.0.0.229:8080/api/cc_send body={content: T-yogai7-ssh-fix: <result>}.

Success = ssh -i ~/.ssh/igor_ed25519 igor_wild_0001@10.0.0.71 echo SSH OK returns SSH OK from akiendelllinux.
